sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  序幕：夏日！温泉！怪谈！

夏日！温泉！怪谈！.say: 真没想到，本次度假地的事一直悬而未决啊……
听我说！度假地点当然是远洋深海！
让我们一起去寻找海怪与失落之城吧！
潜航器里根本活动不开……还是去大洋上追寻幽灵船的踪影更好！
抚顺阁下，布里斯托尔阁下，你们都在说什么啊！
说到夏日，不应该是海滩，泳装以及日光浴么！
这些事在港区就能做到嘛……既然是假日，去做些不一样的事不是更好？
组织舰队去防区外巡逻，成为正义的海上骑士如何？
呃……度假的要素呢？
用工作进行填充了！
好——否决。
指挥室内一片喧嚣，一场关于度假地的讨论正在热烈进行中——
哼~大家真是一点新意都没啊……嗯？指挥官，这是什么？
初月指向的似乎是……某个混杂在文件中的广告宣传单。
没问题没问题，不过先让我看看哦。
嗯……“生活不止诗和远方”……“倾力打造，纯天然温泉度假圣地”？
……“最天然的滋养，最高级的享受，还有最神秘的怪谈”。——
“……神出鬼没的‘妖怪剧团’，其背后的真相究竟是……”
妖怪剧团么……宣传上说得有模有样，不过多半只是用来吸引游客的噱头吧……
不知何时，指挥室的讨论声停止了，所有人都望向正在阅读传单内容的初月。
指挥官，那这张传单我就先……
……大家都看着我做什么？
就是这个啊！！！！
啊？
果然，调查灵异事件才应该是夏日的主题啊！
如果能见到妖怪的话，我赞成！
重樱的妖怪传说么……听上去好有趣。
什、什么妖怪剧团嘛！这些都是宣传用的噱、噱头啦！
还是找其它的……
信浓大人觉得如何呢？
温泉……对抚慰积累已久的疲劳而言，确不失为良策。
且，度假地选在重樱离岛，吾等也能为诸位同伴尽一下地主之谊。
很遗憾，初月微弱的抗议声淹没在了众人的兴致高昂的讨论中。
不出意外的，温泉度假村以高票胜出，正式成为了本次港区度假目的地——

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  平凡温馨度假村

平凡温馨度假村.say: 温泉度假村·主宅
被子……都晒好了，都是暖烘烘的味道。
房间也都打扫完了，保证一尘不染~
零食和饮料都准备齐了，商店里的商品也都齐全~嘿嘿~假期的生意一定会很好！
度假村商店啊……
说起来也奇怪……这种做生意的机会，明石怎么会白白让给你呢？
唔……明石好像有什么事忙不开，就把生意忍痛割爱让给我了。
能代，手续办得怎么样？
是，信浓大人！关于这件事，刚刚已经收到了最终确认文件！
假日期间，整座度假村、连同周边的岛屿与海域都将由我们自由使用。
您安排的事，其余的部分也都在进行中。所有细节都不会放过。
本次我们作为东道主，一定能为指挥官和港区的同伴们提供最优质的服务。
很好。
唔……岛风和骏河呢，从刚才起就不见她们的身影了。
信浓大人，岛风在不久前提出要巡逻度假村确保安全，骏河不放心就跟她一起去了。
需要我将她们二人叫回来么？
巡查么……不必，就随她们二人去吧。
温泉度假村·街道
可疑……
骏河阁下，这里实在是太可疑了！
呃……可疑的点在？
现在明明是白天，可街道上却亮着灯！
……准确来说，现在已经是傍晚了。
可是，岛风没看到开灯的人！
我记得能代之前提过，这里基本都是自动化的设施，所以，这些灯应该也是到了时间就会自动点亮。
原、原来如此……！
那……那里呢！骏河阁下，你看那处鸟居，是不是很可疑！
是是~很可疑，很可疑。
快到晚饭时间了，我们差不多该回去了哦，岛风。
！！！骏河阁下，你看到了吗？
……什么？
刚才有什么东西从鸟居后面飞过去了！
骏河阁下请稍等片刻，我去调查一下！
……等、等等！岛风！
与此同时，主宅（？）之中。
别磨磨蹭蹭了，都动起来动起来，观众们马上就要来了！
嘿嘿嘿……河童……期待……尖叫声。
诶，可别恶作剧过头了啊。
老朽出手有分寸，汝放心，绝对不会伤到客人的。
汝等是……妖怪？
！！！你，你是何人！
竟然能看到吾等！你、你是怎么到这里来的？
妾身，在此地感受到了结界的气息。
在调查途中误打误撞至此……未曾想，妖怪剧团的传闻竟然是真的。
团、团长，怎么办，还没开演就暴露了！
快把她抓起来！千万不能让她去通风报信！
「汝等，说什么？」
哇啊啊啊……好强！
打不过啊……打不过……
这股力量……就连老朽也无能为力。
……团、团长，快逃吧喵！
都安静。
吾乃剧团长食梦貘。尊敬的阁下，欢迎来到吾等的妖怪剧场。
吾为团员们方才的无礼向您道歉。
……无妨。
……看阁下也是通情达理之人。
吾等妖怪剧团常年在此演出，从未做出过伤人之事。
关于演出之事，不知阁下可否能容吾等继续进行呢……？

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  异常事件调查小队

异常事件调查小队.say: 两日后的温泉度假村——
指挥官~我们快到站了哦！
指挥官~我们快到站了哦！
为什么要学我说话……？
哎嘿嘿，因为我太开心了嘛~
但是好奇怪，怎么旅馆门口这么安静？
本来还以为大家会来迎接我们的呢。
……情况确实不对。指挥官。我们上岸至今还没有收到信浓方面发来的任何联络。
理论上来说，这种情况不可能出现。
除非……
嚯嚯……我闻到了神秘事件出现的气息。
（……有种十分不好的预感，先进入旅馆主宅调查一下吧）
温泉度假村·主宅
宾馆内部被信浓大人收拾的井井有条，随时可以入住。
厨房里的食材也都准备好了，新鲜又美味。
茶杯也都摆在桌子上，甚至茶壶里的水都是温的。
但是……本应该在这里的人，全都不见了。
这……这难道是重樱的“神隐”事件？！
指挥官！快看看我找到了什么！！！
抚顺夸张地指向餐桌，桌子上平放着一张与周围格格不入的卡片。
明显是从不同的纸张上剪下的单字被贴在卡片上，拼凑出一封红黑相间的诡异信件。
我来读我来读！
“英明神武的指挥官阁下”
“为欢迎汝等到来，吾等准备了世界第一的精彩演出。”
“汝之同伴已经就位，通往圆形剧场的入口亦已开启。”
“期待汝等到来。”
“——妖怪剧团敬上”
最后是写了妖怪剧团敬上……对吧，对吧！
没想到真的有妖怪剧团！传闻是真的！
居然、居然是真的妖怪……
就是这些自称妖怪剧团的嫌疑人抓走了先来到此地的重樱同伴么。
事情有些严重啊，指挥官同志。
预告信上只写了邀请我们看演出，并没有提到绑架的事。
虽然以信浓的实力应该不会出现危险，不过毕竟是人凭空不见了……
指挥官指挥官！我们可以去调查一下么！
没错！我、抚顺、霞、初月！刚刚好四个人组成调查小队！
这次神秘事件的调查就交给我们吧！
等、等等……为什么把我也算进去了啊！
因为组队最好是四个人啊！
哈啊……啊？
指挥官同志，我还是些不放心。我可以联络港区呼叫支援么？
嗯。原本的计划就是让完成工作后的同伴分批前来度假村。
让下一批来的人提前做些针对“妖怪剧团”的准备好了。
在这期间，相关情报的搜集就交给调查小队。
好耶~保证完成任务！

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  里世界的入口

里世界的入口.say: 温泉度假村·鸟居附近
噗噗说这里有问题……
霞，你说的噗噗到底是……等等，有、有问题是什么问题？
噗噗就是噗噗啊~
嗯……提灯也越来越亮了呢。难道这个鸟居后面隐藏着新的调查点吗？
从形状上来看，确实也对得上那封预告信里提到的……圆形剧场的入口。
啊啊啊啊啊！让开让开！
伴随尖叫声一起出现的，是一声什么东西摔在地上的闷响。
呜~好痛……
抚顺？我还奇怪怎么从刚才起你就不见了呢。
你怎么会从树上摔下来？
呜~我想从空中俯瞰全岛，这样犯人或者先遣队的踪迹就能一目了然。没想到新做的火箭失败了。
这种事拜托萨拉托加小姐的舰载机不就行了？
那就缺少自己调查的仪式感了！呜~好痛……
正好，人也到齐了。现在所有的线索都指向鸟居后面，也许那里就是妖怪剧团的根据地……
走吧，我们去调查一下！
咦？！要直接进去吗？！
我们走吧噗噗。
至、至少通知一下指挥官吧！
初月~再不走的话就要被落下咯~~
……唔、你、你们等等我啊！
温泉度假村·？？？
事、事先声明，我跟着你们可不是因、因为我害怕啊！
我、我只是担心你们遇上了危险应付不了才贴得这么近的！
好好~我信啦~
说、说起来，我们在迷雾里已经走了十几分钟了吧……？
怎么现在都没走出去，鸟居后面有这么大么……
没有哦。我们已经不在度假村里了。
不用担心，噗噗说快要到雾的边界了，有朋友在等着我们。
朋友？难道神秘的妖怪剧团，终于要现身了？！
我不是很想知道那些在等我们的“朋友”是什么……
我们还是先出去向指挥官汇报吧……
已经不能再回头了哦——
礼炮爆炸的响声过后，五颜六色的彩带从房顶飘落下来。
欢迎来到圆形剧场！
欢迎……欢迎。
呀啊啊啊——
不必惊慌，吾等没有恶意。
老朽是剧团的副团长，海坊主。欢迎来到吾等的妖怪剧场。
吾乃剧团经理，狸猫。
我就知道！妖怪剧团果然是真实存在的！
所以你们是妖怪？！哇~果然和我们看起来完全不一样诶！
原来是妖怪，不是鬼啊……（超小声）
所以，温泉会馆里的预告信，是你们留的吗？
……预告信？
小生只在温泉会馆留了一封邀请函后，便回来准备欢迎会了。
原来单纯只是邀请函吗？！
不错，之前剧团长已经和你们的首领商量好了，要排练新剧招待你们。
由于人手不足，贵方的首领也已经带着人员先去参与布置和排练了。
首领是指……信浓大人？
原来如此……我知道了！这一定是重樱的同伴们送给我们的惊喜！
真的不是惊吓么……（超小声）
那么，请稍等片刻。
精彩的剧目即将开演！
妖怪剧团演出的剧目么！好期待！
好期待，噗噗也好期待
咦，等等……就要开始了吗？我们……
我们还没通知指挥官啊——

谁是雪女.say: 白雾散去后，旅人们发现自己来到了雪山之上。
哇……突然出现在雪山上了
简直就像魔法一样……
嘶……好冷啊！这个温度……这些雪居然是真的！
白雪纷飞，狂风呼啸，旅人感觉自己的体力正在流逝。
在此等季节前往雪山，真是一个鲁莽又愚蠢的决定呢。
喂！雪山又不是我们自己来的，不要自顾自地加设定啊！
而且……你是尾张吧？现在是什么情况？
咳……我不是尾张，而是剧中旁白。
而你们，也已经是身处剧目之中的旅人了哦。
原来如此……这就是妖怪剧团所说的……剧目！
还以为是那种传统戏剧的演出，没想到是可以亲自参与的类型！
沉浸式戏剧吗……好有趣！
那么~剧目继续。
旅人们在纷飞的暴雪中艰难前行着。
她们的体力不断流逝，意识也开始模糊。
就在此时，旅人们依稀可以看到前方出现了一座小木屋。
好耶！有了小木屋，就能遮蔽风雪了！
真……真是太冷了，我们快进屋吧！
旅人们用冻僵的手艰难打开房门，进入了木屋之中。
也许是这段艰苦的旅程得到了上天的垂怜。旅人们找到的这座木屋不但坚固，还拥有充足的食物和柴火。
哇……真是太好了。有了柴火可以取暖了！
还有食物可以恢复体力呢~
不过我们擅自闯入别人的屋子里，又吃又用，是不是不太好……
唔、没关系，这种情况可以算是紧急避险！
哇你们快看，这个烤肉……烤得火候刚刚好诶！
我刚好有些饿，就不客气了！
劫后余生的旅人们，开心地围坐在火边，一边享受着美味的食物一边感叹着。
就在此时，“咚”的一声巨响后，冷冽的寒风夹杂着霜雪吹了进来。
呜啊啊！门被吹开了？！快关门快关门！
要是火被吹灭就糟了！
一番手忙脚乱后，旅人们将木门关闭，屋内又恢复了宁静与祥和。
不过，房屋之中，似乎多了一个人。
出去……
？布里斯托尔，你刚说要出去？
啊？没有啊，我都没说话。
人类，是谁允许你们擅闯我的房子！为了惩罚你们，我要将你们冻成冰块！！！
（噫！！！妖、妖怪出现了！）
你是谁？你凭什么说这里是你的家？
吾乃雪女！雪女！这片雪原皆乃吾之所有！
整片雪原？那你有地契吗？地产证也行？不然怎么证明是你的？
地、地产证？我、这……
又是“咚”的一声，冷冽的寒风夹杂着霜雪再次吹了进来。
……快关门！快关门！
人类，谁允许你们闯入我的屋子？我要将你们冻成冰块！！！
酒匂？
人类，吾乃雪女！不是什么酒匂！
不不不……你明明就是酒匂吧！
吾乃雪女！雪女！这片雪原皆乃吾之所有！
哈~好吧，既然你也是雪女的话……
什么叫“也是”，我就是雪女！恐惧吧！颤抖吧！人类，我……
可这里已经有一个雪女了呀。你们谁才是真的？
她是假的！我是真雪女！
我的剧本上写我才是雪女呀！（小声）
？？？你才是假的呢！我是货真价实的雪女！
呃……在两名“雪女”面对面正僵持不下的时候。
“咚”的一声，房门被撞开的声音再次回荡在小木屋里。
……已经第三次了！这次我来关门！
呼……人类，谁允许你们闯入我的屋子？我要将你们冻、冻成……诶、冻成……
……冻成冰块？
对，把你们冻成冰块！
深雪，你在做什么啊？
我不是深雪……我是雪女。
好吧，这位雪女小姐，想把我们冻成冰块的话恐怕你得排队了。
那边还有两个雪女想把我们冻成冰块呢。
欸……我才是雪女哦，那两个应该是冒牌货才对。
你才是冒牌货吧？！
没错，我才是真的雪女！
不，是我！
（啊……妖怪之间争论不休，要到什么时候才能结束啊……）
唔……等等，我知道了！
“气鼓鼓的雪女”才是真正的雪女！
你说什么！我才是真正的雪女！
……你这么说，有证据么？
当然有啦~只是看一眼不就很明白么？
不管你们自称是什么，但你们三个人里，实际上只有一个是真正的妖怪！
由雪女扮演的雪女，才是真正的雪女！

海上惊魂.say: 白雾散去后，旅人们发现自己来到了木船之上。
………这是，第二幕么？！
没错，现在是剧目的第二幕哟。
真的好神奇……前一秒还在雪山上，现在已经在惊涛骇浪中了。
狂风暴雨，巨浪迭起，旅人们感觉自己似乎有些晕船了。
不，我完全不晕。
毕竟，我们是舰船，会晕船的话也太奇怪了。
咳……虽然狂风暴雨，巨浪迭起，但旅人们依然感觉神清气爽！
只是，旅人在大海面前始终只是渺小的存在。
几艘渺小的渔船，在海上的大妖怪面前，又算得了什么呢。
贡品！老朽需要更多的贡品！
把你们的食物和财宝都交出来！
唔啊，这妖怪竟然还要收过路费？太恶劣了！
唉，恶劣又有什么办法啊。
如果海坊主大人对贡品不满意，暴雨就不会停。
暴雨不停，就没办法出海，以后还怎么生活啊！
连老实的渔民都欺负？不可饶恕！我们去打倒它吧。
赞同！再厉害的妖怪，也抵挡不住舰炮的厉害！
是啊，忍气吞声算什么好汉！
我不服！凭什么要把我们辛辛苦苦赚来的钱财和食物送给妖怪！
冷静，冷静点……你不服又能怎么办呢。
除了献上贡品，我们无能为力啊。
哼！今天，我这个小小的渔夫就要替天行道！消灭这个兴风作浪的可恶妖怪！
勇敢的渔民手举鱼叉，气势汹汹地跳下了船。
下一个瞬间，本就不平稳的海面突然掀起巨浪，将勇敢的渔民吞入了漆黑的海水之下。
唉~又一个以卵击石的傻瓜！这又是何必呢？
所以……听我说，千万不能下船啊！
……只要下海就会被剧情杀么，看来直接走过去的方案行不通了。
……假意去上缴贡品，等到妖怪接近的时候，将其消灭，如何？
但是老实去交贡品真的能成功通关吗？
快看！那条船上的人把东西倒进海里了！
海坊主大人！这是给您献上的贡品！希望您能保佑之后的日子风调雨顺！
……大胆人类，这么一点贡品是打算戏弄老朽么？
海坊主似乎对于贡品的数量颇为不满。一道巨浪袭来，认真的渔民也消失在漆黑的海水下。
唉……看来我们带来的贡品根本不够啊。
老天啊~难道真的只能这样等死了吗？
既不能下船给它一炮，也不能直接交贡品……怎么办？
如果把大家的贡品都凑在一起呢？
然后趁着那个妖怪享受贡品的时候给它来上一炮！
一筐接一筐，四周渔船上的贡品全部集中到了一处，连海坊主也不禁投来了贪婪的目光。
这样的贡品还算像话。还不快速速献上，供老朽享用？！
一边说着，海坊主一边贪婪地向着小船的方位缓缓靠近。
太好了，它上钩了……
初月，投一点贡品到水里去，吸引它离得再近点。
好的，包在我身上~
我看看。接下来就扔这一筐…………哇啊啊啊！！！
筐里装的是什么啊啊啊啊啊！这、这根本不是鱼啊啊啊啊！！！
啊……那些好像是，鬼火。
鬼火？！！在动！在动啊——！
……嗯，也许是太过害怕的缘故，其中一位旅人小小的身躯中爆发出了无穷力量。
只见她纵身一跃，从空中跳到了另一条船上，然而等待她却是——
这……这里也有那些东西，哇啊啊啊————！
一艘船接着一艘船，直到跳到第八艘时，旅人发现自己已经来到了海坊主的面前。
这……难道就是传说中的秘技，八船跳……！
（惊恐地挥刀——！）
就这样，海坊主被消灭了，大海恢复了平静，渔民们也终于过上了幸福的生活。
可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
欸……这样就结束了么？

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  舰队集结！

舰队集结！.say: 中场休息时间~
各位旅人，对于本剧团的演出还满意么？

非常满意！
太吓人了！

还想再来！
再来一次吧！
诶？饶了我吧……
喜欢就好，喜欢就好。
那么接下来——
……在摇。
哇啊啊啊！！地震了么！
不是地震，不是地震！
不好了，不好了，有人正在攻击我们的结界！
啊……我说……该不会……你们四个来到这里的事，忘了告诉指挥官？
哇啊啊啊啊！！！光顾着玩了，完全忘了这回事！指挥官好像确实不知道啊！
糟、糟糕！得尽快让外面停止攻击才行！
唉……你们真是……
岛风，你跑得最快，快去叫停指挥官，我们随后就到！
遵，遵命，尾张阁下！
此时的鸟居外——
指挥官同志，目标区域周边已经封锁完毕，待重樱舰队破除结界之后，我们就可以进行突入了。
舰载机编队也已经完成了空中封锁，不管是鸟还是幽灵都别想逃出去！
很好。长门，你那边进展如何？
再给吾十分钟。
山城，武藏集中力量，随吾一鼓作气突破它。
交给我吧，长门大人！
事关信浓和同伴们的安危，吾必会全力以赴。
此刻，长门、山城与武藏正在鸟居前进攻着结界，而在她们身后，则是集结了各阵营整装待发的舰队成员。
结界将在十分钟后突破，所有人做好战斗准备。
遵命！
等、等一下！指挥官，请等一下！
被包围的鸟居里突然传来了熟悉的声音。岛风像是凭空出现一样，从鸟居后方急急忙忙冲了出来。
紧接着是尾张，还有之前不见了踪影的初月、布里斯托尔……调查小队的四人全都冒了出来。
哇……这么大阵仗么？
所以我之前就说……先通知指挥官再进去……
误会，指挥官，这都是误会！你听我们解释啊啊啊啊！
在岛风手忙脚乱地解释下，事情似乎正变得愈发复杂……
还好随后信浓也从结界中出现，亲自解释了事情的来龙去脉，误会终于得到了澄清。
十分抱歉，指挥官。妾身原本只想顺势而为，为诸位带来一场难忘的夏日体验。
万万没想到，在邀请函的环节上出了问题。
原来如此，是妖怪不懂人类的邀请函应该怎么写……
不过，这样的文化差异，确实很难事先料到……
不用在意，信浓，只是虚惊一场的话，无妨。
而且，确实是一段很难忘的体验。
没想到故事里的妖怪剧团是真实存在的。
嗯……它们的存在形式真令人在意啊。
信浓信浓，你刚才说只要进入鸟居，就能看到妖怪剧团了对吧！
嗯，没错。目前它们还不能在结界外自由行动。
指挥官，有妖怪欸，我们一起进去看看吧！
（嗯……大家现在确实兴致高涨。）
（既然误会已经解除，妖怪剧团和信浓又提前做了诸多准备。）
（那就期待和享受一下它们的演出吧——）

英明指挥.say: 那是一个炎炎夏日。晴空万里，艳阳高照。
啊！旁白的声音换了？
这次主角不也换了么……本场剧目的主角是指挥官，我们只是观众而已嘛！
嘘，别出声，好好看！
咳……那么妾身继续。
此刻，大军正沿着林间道路行走着。而领军的大将正坐轿子中，略显疲惫地眯着眼。
……轿子？这场剧目是古装剧……？
不错。领军的大将正坐在豪华的轿子中，身边被无数古玩珍宝所包围。
……在轿子中还放了古玩和珍宝……？
（仔细一看，除了轿内的装潢之外，我身上的衣服也十分华丽。）
（看来我所扮演的剧目主角，是一个极其富有的人。）
报、报告主公！前线战况进展十分顺利！
我军先锋如入无人之境，已经拿下了敌人两座城！相信很快就能取得胜利了！
嚯嚯嚯~那是当然！有我等大军压境，还有主公亲自出马，胜利是自然的事！
反而是对面，非但不投降，居然还敢抵抗~真是不识好歹！
好啦……好啦，消消气。现在天气这么热，再生气的话可是会起痘痘的哦。
报、报告大人！前方道路周边聚集起了很多村民！
似乎是在得知大军会行经此处后，自发组织起来为我们准备了美食美酒，以犒慰我军的辛劳！
哦~这些村民还真是识大体啊。那我们就干脆停下来休息一下好了！
是啊大人……现在天气那么热，，周围的村民们又盛情难却，我们不如停下来休息一下吧？
休息的地方……就选附近山脚下的平整区域如何？虽然面积不大，不过也足够本阵扎营了。
就这样，大军扎好了营帐，在村民提供的美食与美酒中放松休息了起来。
（现在是在行军打仗途中，就这样随便决定在路边扎营……？）
（而且选择的位置……本阵的距离其他部队距离过远，而且容遭到来自山上的偷袭……）
就这样，大军扎好了营帐，在村民提供的美食与美酒中放松休息了起来。
等等！我还没决定呢——！
（有种……十分不好的预感。）
此刻，我正坐在一顶豪华的大帐篷中。
除了无数美食之外，身旁的帐篷中还有衣架、刀架、书架、宝物柜，甚至……宠物？
（不愧是妖怪剧团，在转瞬间就完成了场景切换，而且如此逼真。）
（不过……这些东西，真的是出来打仗应该带的么。）
大人~外面的士兵都喝成一片了，您一个人在大帐中做什么呢？
说不定就是因为如此，大人才要特意在这里等我们呢。
现在大帐里什么人都没有，也就是说，接下来做些什么事都可以哦~
有道理……那大人，接下来想对我们做什么呢……啊，大人！
为什么您一直盯着她看？看看我嘛！您看我还特意起了名字，“魅力四射的舞女”！
明明是我更有魅力吧！
祥和的氛围突然被一声惊雷打破。
转瞬间，暴雨倾盆。
下雨了啊……
唔，好像想起了一件非常重要的事——
……这个虽然也很重要，但是不对。忘了先问问这是哪里了！
回禀主公，此地名为桶狭间！
真没想到，刚刚还是万里晴空，现在却突降大雨，主公您还是在帐篷里避雨吧！
原来如此，此地名为桶狭间啊……
等等……驻军在桶狭间，然后天降大雨……？！
这剧本是谁选的啊？！！
不好……得赶紧备战才行！
与此同时，借助雷雨的掩护，一支骑兵部队已经悄然来到了山顶的进攻位置。
主公，我们已经抵达进攻位置了，等候您的命令。
没想到路上突然下起了暴雨，主公真是如有神助呢。
是啊，多亏了主公决意出击，我们才能等到如此天赐良机。
呼呼呼~再多夸夸我~再多夸夸我~！
真……真的要打下去么？
那是自然，战场之上，不容私情。
主公，只要您一声令下，我们一定为您带来胜利。
是啊，准备进攻吧，我已经等不及了~

options.content: 从途中开始就已经不是马了吧！

英明指挥.say: 呵呵，您能喜欢就好。
咳……妾身曾听说，只要骑着东西，都可以被算作骑兵。
嗯……因为出战匆忙，这支骑兵部队的马匹装备并不统一。
不过其中的每一个人都在主公的带领下散发着无穷斗志。
亲爱的已经在山下摆好阵势等我们了呢~
全军注意，准备战斗！
目标只有——亲爱的一个人！
不妙，形势非常不妙……扎营在四周的大军因为突发暴雨无法及时赶到。
本阵已经被孤立了……
转瞬间，喊杀声便来到了华丽的帐篷外。
帐篷的门帘被挑开，全副武装的敌方主公走上前来。
糟糕……万事休矣啊……
亲爱的~你已经无处可逃了哦！
亲爱的————
然后敌方主将，径直扑了上来……？
就这样，战斗结束了，和平重新降临了这片土地。
全剧终——
亲爱的~~~~~（蹭蹭蹭）
好了好了……戏演完了就别贴得那么近了！
才不要~！话说你是从哪儿冒出来的啊！
从一开始就在了啊！
……全剧终？

度假村神秘事件调查报告.say: 风波结束后又过去了数日，温泉度假村已经完全恢复了假日的气息。
入夜后前往结界内欣赏妖怪剧团的剧目，变成了一项在绝大多数同伴中备受好评的活动。
然而，在某个清晨，假日办公桌上出现了这样一份文件——
……《度假村神秘事件调查报告》，布里斯托尔撰写。
「……我们栖身在愚昧无知的封闭岛屿上，全然不知祂已悄然降临……」
「……我看见，在狂风暴雪的阴影里，白色的雪变得不再是雪……」
「……我看见，在肮脏的海水中，不可名状的海怪正疯狂吞噬着扭曲的同类……」
「……我看见，暴雨之后，天空露出怪异的微笑。黑影们舞蹈着、扭曲着，渐渐吞噬了唯一的火光……」
「……平凡人类的法则、思维，在这里一切都没有意义……」
「……我本不应前行，我本早该掉头折返，但我依然在前行，在探寻，在见证……」
「……这些由无数伟大与奥秘所混合而成的禁忌奇迹……」

options.content: 将整份报告书锁进档案柜最深处。

度假村神秘事件调查报告.say: 附带：《调查小组检讨书》4份，基洛夫、萨拉托加监制。
《度假村神秘事件调查》——全剧终喵~

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  番外篇：于演出开始之前

于演出开始之前.say: 这是在正式演出开始前发生的，某一幕故事的后续——
吾等妖怪剧团在此常年演出，从未做出过伤人之事。
关于演出之事，不只阁下可否容吾等继续进行呢？
汝等所谓的演出，是打算装神弄鬼吓唬妾身的同伴们，没错吧？
虽然是笑着说出了自己的疑问，然而妖怪剧团的团长——食梦貘并没有从对方的话语中感觉到任何笑意。
强烈的压迫感席卷了它的全身。
那个，信浓大人您说笑了，怎么就是装神弄鬼吓唬人了呢？
只是普通的恶作剧罢了……既然信浓大人不喜欢的话，我这就去通知团员停止演出。
汝等……为何要将恶作剧称之为演出？
唉，其实恶作剧捉弄人也不是吾等的本意。
只是在结界之外，一般人无法看到吾等。要想被人所察觉，只能弄出些奇怪的动静……
换言之，只要进入结界，便能如妾身一般见到汝等的真面目了？
道理上是这样。只是结界入口日渐破败……已经没有让一般人进入其中的力量了。
夏日与妖怪剧团……呵呵，倒是不错的组合。指挥官与同伴们一定会喜欢的。
剧团长，妾身忽然想到了……一个双赢之法，不知可否听上一听？

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  番外篇：曲曲妖怪而已

曲曲妖怪而已.say: 这是在正式演出开始前发生的，某一幕故事的后续——
随着清扫工作的收尾，由良一行人回到了房间中休息。
异变，也是在此时突然发生的。
温泉度假村·主宅？
你们有没有觉得，外面街道的风景变得怪怪的……？
……外面，好像不是原来的温泉街了。
难道和刚才的震动有关？我去看一下信浓大人的情况！
等一下，能代！这种时候大家不要分散行动，我们一起去。
由良，是我眼花了吗？还是最近市面上出现了什么我不知道新产品？
那个杯子是不是自己在动？
哇啊啊，真的在动欸！甚至还飞起来了！
这难道是……灵异事件？！
回~去~快~回~去~
入~侵~者~快~回~去~
呜……难道妖怪剧团的传闻是真的，这里真的有妖怪……
回~去~快~回~去~入~侵~者~去~快~回~去~
声音怎么越来越大了，耳朵好痛……！
…………我感受到了，是在那个方位么。
「不要再胡闹了！」
由良伸手，似乎在半空中抓到了什么。随即，刺耳的声音消失了。
……这个是，鬼火？
咦？！在哪里哪里，现在在你手里么，我怎么完全看不到？！
也许是因为它现在的力量太弱了，所以你们才看不到吧。
嗯，接下来要怎么处理它呢……
咦，信浓大人发通讯来了？！

sequence: 度假村神秘事件调查  番外篇：动如脱兔！

动如脱兔！.say: 这是在正式演出开始前发生的，某一幕故事的后续——
温泉度假村·？？？
果然……奇怪的飞行物又出现了！
……骏河阁下你快看前面！
咦？！骏河阁下————！
少女环顾四周，可并没有发现骏河的身影。
糟、糟糕……岛风跑得太快把骏河阁下落在身后了！
啊！！！好忙啊好忙啊~喂！你！那边的兔子小姐！
就是你！演出马上就要开始了，你怎么还在这里磨蹭？
……咦？是在喊岛风么？
当然啊，这里除了你还有第二只兔子么！
快去前面通知河童，告诉它演出就要开始了！
我还得去通知其他妖怪！啊~忙死了~忙死了~
飞得好快……？！
哼哼~论速度，岛风也不会输哦！
岛风，全速前进——！
……演出时间……收到……
……接下来……请去通知……雪女……
……欸？！还要去通知雪女是么！
明白了！岛风，再次全速前进——！
哎呀，真是可爱的小兔子~多谢你来通知我。
接下来能拜托你去通知鸦天狗么？
明白了！岛风，再次全速前进——！
多谢你赶来通知，接下来是————
我明白了！岛风，再次全速前进——！
等等，小生还没说让你去找谁呢！！
呼……呼……呼…………终于全部通知完了！
妖怪剧团的演出啊……真是令人期待！
奇怪，岛风总感觉似乎忘记了什么重要的事……
啊——哇啊啊啊！！岛风把寻找骏河阁下的事忘到天边了！！！
岛风，能听到么？
呜啊啊！骏河阁下！！你平安无事真是太好了！！！
……发生什么事了么？
没什么，没什么！什么事都没有哦！
噢……那就好。
我和信浓大人正在剧场会客室与妖怪剧团的剧团长协商一些事情。
你现在能赶过来么？
不愧是信浓大人！已经收服妖怪剧团了吗！
呃……也不算收服，更像是合作准备惊喜之类的吧。
总之，你过来以后就知道了。
和妖怪剧团一起准备惊喜么……好有趣！
指挥官和其他同伴们一定会喜欢的！！
骏河阁下稍等，岛风这就来与你汇合！
此时的少女们并不知道——
她们所准备的惊喜，在不久的将来会变成一份“惊吓”，狠狠地砸在同伴们的身上——！

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories

Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.say: So there's absolutely no consensus on our next vacation destination...
Then obviously we go to the deep sea instead!
Think about it – there are undiscovered monsters and lost treasure down there!
Sounds great... if you like being stuck inside a submarine. My vote still goes to pursuing ghost ships!
Fu Shun, Bristol, don't be absurd! Those aren't summer activities!
Summer means swimsuits, beaches, and sunbathing! Ideally, all three at once!
Yeah, but we can do that right here. Shouldn't we do something, you know, different for our vacation?
The Knights of the Sea could organize a vigilante patrol.
Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.factiontag: Big Sis Knight of the Sea

Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.say: Aaand... what's that got to do with vacationing?
Think of it like a work-cation.
Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.factiontag: Big Sis Knight of the Sea

Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.say: Someone play the extremely loud incorrect buzzer. We're vetoing that plan!
The debate continues for some time, with no sign of a consensus in sight.
None of these ideas really feel like "the one"... Oh, hey, Commander! What's this?

options.content: Just another one of Akashi's ads.
Toss that one into the shredder!

Summer, Hot Springs, and Ghost Stories.say: Hatsuzuki pulled out a leaflet from among a pile of documents.
Okay. Let me just skim it and see what it's about...
Huh. "A place to get away from it all"... "Refresh your body and spirit at our onsen resort and bathe in water straight from the source"...
..."Experience sublimity surrounded by nature"... "Enjoy some of the local ghost stories"...
..."The elusive Youkai Troupe, which remains a legend"...
"Youkai Troupe," eh... The ad touts it as real, but it's obviously just a shtick to lure in tourists.
It suddenly becomes palpable how silent it is in the office. Everyone's gaze is transfixed on the flyer in Hatsuzuki's hands.
Oh well. I'll go ahead and dispose of it as...
...Wh-why are you all looking at me?
That's the one!
It is?
Of course it is! Summer is the season of testing your courage, and ghost stories!
It sure gets my vote if it means I get to see some sick youkai!
Like from Sakuran legends? Hell yeah, I'm in!
Y-you know youkai aren't real, right? They're just stories!
I say we go for something else, like–
Shinano, what do you think?
Washing away one's stress and fatigue in an onsen... A splendid proposal...
As it also sits on a remote Sakuran isle, we could further invite other factions to experience our hospitality...
Hatsuzuki's objections are drowned in a sea of discussion in favor of the idea.
To no surprise, the onsen resort plan took the vast majority of the votes, and so our next vacation destination was decided.

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Calm at the Onsen Resort

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: Onsen Resort - Inn Main Building
I've finished airing out all the futons... Now they're nice and soft.
And I finished cleaning the rooms. You won't find one speck of dust in there!
Snacks and refreshments're lookin' good, and I just got done setting up my stall. This is gonna be one profitable vacay for me♪
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: Don't you think it's odd that Akashi just... lets you run a stand?
It's her resort, and I can't think of any good reason why she'd be fine with others earning money she could be making.
I mean, she straight-up told me she's busy with somethin' else and she's got no choice but to let me have her biz.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: I take it the preparations are proceeding smoothly, Noshiro?
Yes. I just received the final confirmation letter, in fact.
Our visitors will have unrestricted access to the resort, the island, and the surrounding waters during their stay.
I've put in the requests for everything you outlined, so all should be in order.
I'm confident that we, as the hosts, will be able to provide the best possible experience for the Commander as well as all our other guests.
That is excellent to hear...
Incidentally, where are Shimakaze and Suruga? This one hasn't seen them...
Shimakaze asked to look around the resort, so she's on a patrol at the moment. As for Suruga... she went after her to keep an eye on her.
Shall I summon them here?
Nay... Let them continue their patrol...
Onsen Resort - City Streets
Hrmh... Eerie...
Suruga! This place is eerie to the extreme!
Uh-huh? Like how?
It's daytime, yet the lanterns are lit!
It's not "daytime," it's evening. It makes sense to start lighting them now.
So you say, but I've not seen anybody actually lighting the flames!
Because this place is mostly automated. The lanterns turn themselves on when it's time. Noshiro told me.
Oh! That explains that...
But it doesn't explain THAT! See? Something about that torii gate feels mighty eerie to me!
And what is that "something," huh? Fine, it's eerie. So what?
It doesn't matter. It's nearly dinnertime, so let's head back or we'll be late.
Oh! Suruga! Did you see that?!
Ugh. What is this time?
Something definitely flew out from behind that torii gate!
I must look into this! Stay here while I go investigate!
We'll miss dinner if we don't... Hey! Wait, Shimakaze!
Meanwhile, inside the inn's main building...
Okay, let us move. We wouldn't want to keep the audience waiting.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: I-I can't wait... to see everyone's reactions...
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Cure Her Social Anxiety

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: *sigh*... Don't go too far with the pranks now, okay?
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: You needn't tell me twice. I know how to moderate myself♪
Are you... youkai...?
Hey! Who's there?!
How can you see us? How did you even get here?
I sensed a barrier in the vicinity of the resort...
I went to investigate... Of course, an encounter with the Youkai Troupe is not what I expected...
This ain't good, chief! We've been exposed 'fore the show even started!
Our only option is to subdue her here and now! Do not let the cat out of the bag!
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: Subdue, you say...?
Gaahhh! Such power!
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: We don't stand a chance, wearing these costumes...
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Cure Her Social Anxiety

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: Aye... Even I am forced to raise the white flag.
Screw it, chief! We need to bail, nya!
"Nya"? Might your true form be...?
Quiet. Everybody, quiet.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: I'm... *yawn*... the dream-eater baku, also known as the chief. The Youkai Troupe bids you welcome.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: First of all... Let me make it up to you for how rude the others were.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: As you say...
Great. I knew you'd be willing to talk it out.
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: *yawn*... So, our troupe has been entertaining the resort for a looong time, and we've never hurt a soul...
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Calm at the Onsen Resort.say: So, be nice and pretend you didn't see us, alright?
Calm at the Onsen Resort.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Spirited Away

Spirited Away.say: Onsen Resort - 2 days later...
Commander, we're almost there!
Commander, we're almost there!
...Why are you parroting me?
I'm just so excited I couldn't think of anything else to say!
Although, it's weird how empty this place is. Shouldn't there be people in the lobby?
The first group that went said they'd come out and meet us...
It IS weird. Stranger yet, Comrade Commander, I haven't received any word from Shinano since we disembarked.
She would never leave us hanging under normal circumstances.
Unless...
Heheheh... This just screams "mystery" to me!
(Something is wrong here. We should head to the main building and investigate.)
Onsen Resort - Inn Main Building
Shinano made the place really tidy... I'd stay here any day of the week.
There are lots of fresh and tasty ingredients in the kitchen too...
I suppose this tea was going to be our welcoming drink... Curiously, the kettle is still warm.
Someone must've been here recently. But who? And where are they now?
This feels eerie... It's almost as if everyone was spirited away!
Commander! Look at this!
Fu Shun gestures toward the dining table, on top of which there's a card radiating an abnormal energy.
And on top of the black and red card, there's a slip of paper with letters in various fonts cut out from magazines. To be frank, it looks extremely creepy.
Wow! Let me read it aloud.
"Dear Commander, ever the wise and brave one..."
"We wish to make you and your fleetmates feel welcome, and have planned the most wonderful play in the world for you."
"Please head through the entrance of the amphitheater. Your companions are waiting for you."
"We cannot wait to see you. Yours truly..."
"...The Youkai Troupe."
Look! It really says "Youkai Troupe" on it!
The same troupe that that flyer mentioned! Incredible! The Youkai Troupe actually exists!
It'd be false advertising if it DIDN'T exist! That doesn't mean they're real youkai, though...
It sounds to me like these "Youkai Troupe" people kidnapped the group that arrived before us.
This goes beyond some little prank. This is dead serious, Comrade Commander.
Well...
Sure, the first group is nowhere to be seen, but I think it's jumping the gun to assume that they've been kidnapped.
You know what this means, Commander. Let us investigate what's happened!
You heard me! Between me, Fu Shun, Kasumi, and Hatsuzuki, we've got just enough people to form an investigation team.
Trust us, we've got this. Let the four of us investigate!
Hold on! Why am I automatically a part of this?
Because it's customary for an investigation team to consist of four people, duh!
Uh-huh... "Customary."
I'm feeling apprehensive about this, Comrade Commander. Should we radio the port and request backup?
I mean, other groups coming to the resort after finishing their respective tasks was our original plan.
While calling in backup feels excessive, I believe we should inform the groups arriving after us about this Youkai Troupe in advance.
Until everyone has arrived, I say we let Bristol and her team conduct the investigation.
Hooray! We'll have this case solved in no time, I promise!

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Entrance to the Dark World

Entrance to the Dark World.say: Onsen Resort - Near the eerie torii gate
Foo says this place feels eerie...
Foo? Who's that? And what exactly about it is so eerie?
Foo is just Foo...
Hmm... My investigation lantern is getting brighter and brighter. I think there's a new investigation point just behind this torii gate.
It does match the description that was in the note... The amphitheater must be up these stairs.
Look ooout! Out of the waaay!
A voice cries out from the treeline and is followed by a thud.
Owww...
Fu Shun? I was wondering where you'd gone.
What were you doing in that tree?
Owch... I wanted to get to a vantage point to see if I could find the kidnappers and the first group, but my new booster rocket completely failed...
You could just, you know, ask Saratoga to launch her recon planes for you.
But that's cheating! It wouldn't feel like I'M doing the investigating! Oww...
At least the gang is all together now. All clues point past the torii gate, so I think that's where we'll find the Youkai Troupe's base or something like that!
Come on, team! Let's get in there and investigate!
What?! We're going in just like that?
Let's go, Foo.
Hold up! Let me at least radio the Commander before we–
Hurry along, Hatsuzuki! You're gonna get left behind!
...Okay, okay! Wait for me!
Onsen Resort - ???
Um, just for the record, monsters and ghosts don't scare me! Not in the slightest!
I'm only staying so close because I don't want any of you running into danger, okay?
Sure, I'll believe that~
Good... A-also, haven't we been walking for quite some time now?
It feels like we've been wading through this fog for ages... Do torii gates always lead to stairs this long?
They don't. We should be way past the resort by now.
What?!
But Foo said the fog will come to an end very soon. Our friends are waiting for us.
Friends? Are we finally gonna come face-to-face with the Youkai Troupe?
I dunno... I wouldn't call them "friends," and I'm not too keen to meet them...
Let's just turn back and report this to the Commander!
It's too late to turn back now...
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Entrance to the Dark World.say: PANG! PANG!
Firecrackers panged and popped while multicolored ribbons rained from the ceiling.
Welcome to the amphitheater, y'all!
W-welcome...
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: Wants to Cure Her Social Anxiety

Entrance to the Dark World.say: EEEEEEEK!
Settle down, li'l lassie. Us youkai mean you no harm.
The name's Umibouzu. I'm the vice-chief o' this here troupe, and this here is our youkai theater. Welcome!
And I am Tanuki, the manager.
Wow! You're real! The Youkai Troupe is real!
So you're all youkai, huh? Makes sense why you look completely different to us!
(extremely quiet whisper) Thank god they're youkai and not ghosts...
Was it you who left the calling card in the inn?
...What calling card?
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Entrance to the Dark World.say: We left you an invitation, and no more than that.
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Entrance to the Dark World.say: You call that an "invitation"?!
Yes...? Our chief and your leader spoke about this. We are working on a play to amuse the guests.
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Entrance to the Dark World.say: And since we are short on hands, your leader has relocated her staff from the inn to help with rehearsals and preparations.
Entrance to the Dark World.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Entrance to the Dark World.say: "Leader"? Do you mean... Shinano?
That explains a lot! The first group just wanted to surprise us!
(extremely quiet whisper) More like scare the life out of us...
The show is about to get started. Just hang on a minute.
I can tell you right now that you're gonna love it!
Awesome! I for one can't wait to see this play!
Foo looks forward to it too.
Wait, what? The play is starting now? But...
But we still haven't radioed the Commander!

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: As the white mist cleared, the travelers suddenly found 'emselves in a hella snowy mountain landscape!
Wh-where did all this snow come from?!
Achoo! Talk about a scene transition!
Brrr! It's freezing cold... Is this real snow?!
The wind was all, like, super cold, drainin' the travelers of energy and making 'em shudder.
Geesh, y'all really screwed the pooch here. No sane person travels up a snowy mountain in this season.
We didn't exactly WANT to come here! Don't force dumb backstories on us!
I know that's you, by the way, Owari. What's going on here?
I ain't Owari, I'm the narrator!
And you four are, like, travelers. You're a part of the play!
Ohhh. This is "the show" they mentioned just earlier!
I thought we'd sit down in a theater or something. It's even cooler that we get to play a role ourselves!
Immersive storytelling... I like it!
Cool. Then let's carry on.
So... The travelers kept wadin' through the insano blizzard. It was rough.
They were at their breaking point. Freezing, exhausted, and boutta pass out.
But then – bum-bum-buuum – they spotted a hut in the wilderness!
Hooray! We won't have to freeze our butts off out here!
Thank god. Let's go inside, quickly.
The travelers forced the hut's door open with their cold, shaking hands and went in.
God must've felt bad for 'em or something, 'cause the hut was full of divine surprises. There was tons of food and firewood, and the hut's walls were thick and durable!
Phew... We can use the wood to start a fire and warm up!
There's food, too, so we won't go hungry.
Although... doesn't it feel wrong to break into someone's hut and eat all their food?
It's fiiine. This is an emergency, so I'm sure they won't mind!
Let's roast some meat over the fire until nice and crispy. Aaand... done!
Frankly, I'm starving, so I'm gonna dig in right now!
The travelers, free of the freezing temperatures and harsh snow outside, sat around the fire and chewed the fat – and their food.
But then, the door flung open with a thud, and a snowy gust blew into the room!
Brrrr! Someone close the door, quick!
We can't let the wind blow out the fire!
It took a lotta work, but the travelers managed to shut the door. The cabin was quiet once more.
Or so they thought! The realization hit 'em like a cold breeze – someone else was here!
Get out.
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: Huh? Bristol, did you hear that?
No? I didn't hear anything.
Get out of here!
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: Foolish mortals! You are not welcome inside my hut! I shall turn you to ice as punishment for your intrusion!
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: Eek! I-it's another youkai!
Take it easy! Miss Ghost, do you have any way to prove this is your home?
I am Yuki-Onna – the snow lady – and I've roamed this mountain for ages upon ages. Everything around you belongs to me!
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: Everything? Do you have the landowner documentation? What about the hut's construction permit? If you don't, how can you claim it belongs to you?
L-landowner documentation? I, uh...
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: At that moment – slam! – the door swung open, and another snowy gust blew into the hut!
Not again! Close the door!
Stupid mortals! Who gave you permission to enter my hut? I'm gonna turn you into a popsicle as punishment♪
Sakawa?
I'll only say this once, dummy! I am not Sakawa, I am Yuki-Onna!
No, it's painfully obvious you're Sakawa!
I am Yuki-Onna – the snow lady – and I've roamed this mountain for ages upon ages. Everything around you belongs to me!
This is getting out of hand... Now there are two of them!
No! There is only one of me! Now, tremble in fear! Your shipgirl powers do not work here. You are fully at my–
Okay, pause! Which one of you is the real deal?
...What?
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: She's the impostor! I am the real one!
(whisper) It's in the script, y'know.
That's news to me. As far as I know, you're the fake and I'm the real one.
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: Sooo... there were, like, two Yuki-Onnas in the hut.
But then! The door swung open with a loud thud!
That's the third time now! I'm gonna shut the door tightly this time!
M-mortals... Who said you could go into my hut? You've made me mad, so I'm g-gonna... Umm...
...Turn us into ice?
Right, yeah... I'm gonna turn you into ice...
Seriously, Miyuki?
I-I'm not Miyuki, I'm Yuki-Onna...
Alright, alright, you wanna turn us into ice. Let's be polite and get in line.
There are two more Yuki-Onnas waiting to do the same.
T-two more? But... But I'm the real one...
That's exactly what an impostor would say!
You're right about that much. I am the real one, after all.
Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Will the Real Yuki-Onna Please Stand Up.say: No, no, no! I – me – I'M the real one!
(What a farce. This is gonna go on forever.)
Hmm... Okay, I've figured it out!
She's the real one. The one who's tired of this.
What? You're saying I'm a poser?
How... How do you know it's her?
Come on. It's obvious even at a glance.
Sakawa, Miyuki, you two keep insisting you're the real deal, but you don't look like it at all!
Meanwhile, she's actually dressed to look the part! She's the real Yuki-Onna!
Whoa! That makes total sense!

Beast from the Depths.say: As the white mist cleared, the travelers suddenly found 'emselves aboard a big-ass wooden boat!
...What does that mean? Is this the second act?
Ding-ding-ding! Correctamundo.
But we were just in a hut in a snowstorm... What a strange transition.
Rain was pourin' down, the wind was howling, and the seas were rockin' like crazy. The travelers were starting to get some mad seasickness.
Are we? I feel perfectly fine.
Yeah, it makes no sense for shipgirls to get seasick.
That so? Ahem... Rain was pourin' down, the wind was howling, and the seas were rockin' like crazy. Despite that, the travelers looked right as rain!
Clearly, they were badasses – badasses, but they were tiny compared to the ocean.
Especially compared to the colossal beast of the sea. Yes, an Umibouzu towered above them and their teensy fishing boats!
Aye. I demand tribute. Tribute for the Umibouzu!
Your food, your valuables... Give them all to me!
Yikes... I've heard about this. It's an extortion tactic where criminals demand protection money, I think.
Hippity hoppity... Such is life, I'm afraid.
You need to appease the Umibouzu, or else the storm will never let up.
And if the storm never lets up, I won't be able to fish. Then I'll go out of business!
That's so mean to the poor fisherwoman! I say we gang up on the big baddy and take it down!
Agreed. It doesn't matter if it's a powerful youkai – our cannons will make short work of it!
Exactly. We need to stand up to our oppressors!
I worked like a dog for this haul! Why should I stand and watch while some youkai steals the fruits of my labor?
Goodness... Please, brave lady, simmer down!
It's infuriating, I know, but we are compelled – destined, even – to offer tribute to the youkai!
Really? Well, I've had enough of this! On this day, I'm going to defy destiny and teach this cruel monster a lesson!
Oookay... The brave fisherwoman took up a harpoon and leaped out of her boat, hell-bent on taking down the Umibouzu.
But! Just a moment later, a giant wave rose from the turbulent sea, and swallowed the unfortunate fisherwoman!
*sigh*... See? I tried to warn you!
The rest of you! I suggest you stay in your boat!
So the waves will sweep us away if we get out... Yeah, I guess we can't use our riggings then.
We could sail closer, acting like we're going to offer tribute... then beat it up.
Something tells me there's no way to advance without giving it something for realsies.
Look! That fisherwoman chucked something into the sea!
O mighty Umibouzu, I offer you this tribute! Please give me your blessings so I may go unnoticed and nothing bad will happen to me!
Brazen human... You think this paltry tribute will appease me?
Uh-oh. Looks like that wasn't enough for the Umibouzu. It sent a huge wave after the fisherwoman and sank her boat!
Oh geesh, oh man... I doubt what little we have will be nearly enough to satisfy the Umibouzu!
We're damned if we do, damned if we don't!
So offering goods won't work, and shooting it won't either... Then what are we supposed to do?
First of all, let's search the ships for anything left of value.
We'll distract the Umibouzu with as many goods as we can, then knock its lights out.
That's brilliant! You're a genius!
(Isn't that essentially what Kasumi proposed, though?)
The travelers took tributes from all the surroundin' boats and gathered them in one place. The Umibouzu looked at all of it with greedy eyes!
The last of the goods, that be. Now offer them to me!
The Umibouzu closed in on the heap of treasure as it bellowed an order.
Okay, it's on the hook!
Hatsuzuki, throw a few tributes into the water! Get it just a bit closer!
Alright, got it!
This should do it. One, two, three... EEEEEK!
Wh-wh-wh-what the heck is this?! That is NOT a fish!
That's uh, lemme see... That's a will-o'-the-wisp.
W-w-will-o'-the-wisp?! Why is it moving?! WHY IS IT MOVING?!
Uhh... One of the travelers was so utterly filled with fear that it gave her the strength to perform a small miracle.
Like a frog juiced up on energy drinks, she jumped through the air onto another fishing boat! But, there was another surprise awaiting her there...
OH MY GOD! THERE'S A WHOLE SWARM OF THEM HERE! EEEEEEK!
Shoutin' and shriekin', she leaped from boat to boat until eventually, she was face-to-face with the Umibouzu!
Impressive... Fancy that herculean acrobatic feat as tribute, do you?
*lets out an ungodly scream as she swings her katana*
The Umibouzu was slain. Calm returned to the seas and the fishers were finally able to resume their peaceful lives.
And everyone lived happily ever after.
What? That's it?
THAT'S how the story ends?!

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Assemble the Fleet!

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Well, it's time for the intermission.
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Travelers, was our play to your liking?
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Assemble the Fleet!.say: - It was great. - I'll have nightmares about this!
- I can't wait for more! - Show us the next act already!
Wait, there's more?! God, have mercy on me...
Ah. That's great to hear.
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Now, let us continue to the–
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Assemble the Fleet!.say: BOOOM!
...What was that?
BOOOM!
Zoinks! Is that an earthquake?!
Naw, girl, that's definitely no earthquake!
This ain't good, folks! Someone's attacking the barrier!
Attacking it?
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Oh boy... Lemme guess, y'all forgot to tell the Commander you were goin' here, didn'tcha?
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Oh! Right! I knew we'd forgotten something!
Uh-oh! We need to stop the attack immediately!
*sigh*... Just what we needed...
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Shimakaze, you're the quickest – scoot over there 'n tell the Commander to stop! We'll take things from here!
Assemble the Fleet!.factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Assemble the Fleet!.say: Roger-dodger! I'm on my way!
Meanwhile, outside the strange torii gate...
Comrade Commander, we've finished blockading the waters around the island. Entry will be possible once the barrier has been destroyed.
I've got the skies under complete lockdown, too. Not a single bird or ghost is getting out!
Excellent. Nagato, how are things on your end?
Expected to finish in ten minutes.
Yamashiro, Musashi, focus fire. Coordinate your attacks on the talisman with me.
Understood, Lady Nagato!
Shinano and the girls' safety hinges on us. I will hold nothing back.
Nagato, Yamashiro, and Musashi are bombarding the barrier. A group of shipgirls from all factions stood just behind them, ready to run in.
The talisman will be destroyed in ten minutes. All ships, prepare for battle!
Roger!
Wait, wait! Please wait, Commander!
A familiar voice calls out to me from nowhere. Then, Shimakaze appears seemingly out of thin air from beyond the torii gate.
More follow a few moments later. Owari, Hatsuzuki, and Bristol with the rest of her team.
Geesh, you guys gathered a small army here...
See? I TOLD you we should've called the Commander before we went in!
This is all a big misunderstanding, Commander! Please allow me a minute to explain!
Shimakaze, in her panic, blew way past a summary and dove into a convoluted explanation...
Fortunately, Shinano had come along, and she provided me with a brief overview of what had happened.
All we intended for was an unforgettable summer experience... We are truly sorry...
This one suspected the invitation of poor messaging... A mistake most unfortunate...
I understand now. You wanted to make it look like a spiriting-away case as part of the play.
Instead, it made your intentions all the more fuzzy.
Such a misunderstanding is nobody's fault. Let it not bother you.
I'll admit, it DID result in an unforgettable experience.
It was certainly the last way I expected that flyer to keep its word.
I wondered what form this Youkai Troupe would take, and I was not disappointed.
Speaking of them, is that where we'll meet the troupe? Just past the barrier under the torii gate?
Yes... They cannot leave the barrier in their current forms...
Did you hear that? We'll get to see some real youkai! Let's go!
(Well... I suppose the crisis is over now.)
(Everyone's safe, and I don't want to undermine the efforts Shinano and the Youkai Troupe put into all this.)
(Let's head in and see what this play is like.)

General Commander.say: It was a fervid summer day... The skies were clear, and the sun hung high in the sky...
Hey! They got a new narrator!
And new actors, too. The Commander's the lead now, and it's our turn to watch the play.
We should be quiet then! Like audience members are supposed to!
Ahem... As this one was saying...
An army marched the path through the woodlands. Their general – the Commander – was resting inside a sedan chair, carried by the troops...
Wait, a sedan chair? Is this story set during the Warring States period?
Indeed... The Commander's sedan chair was large and highly ornate, filled with curiosities and antiques – more than one could count...
It IS pretty spacious in here. It could do without all the boxes and bottles, though...
And this uniform... it's very different to my usual one. I look like some sort of Edo-period magistrate.
Safe to assume, I must be playing an extremely wealthy person.
I-I bring you a report, Milord! Our battle on the front is unfolding smoothly!
Milord's vanguard has already seized two castles with all the ease of a walk through the grasslands! Victory shall surely be yours soon!
Hahahah! Of course! Our great army's victory is inevitable, particularly with Milord at the helm!
Our foes would be wise to surrender, and instead they struggle like imbeciles! They must be taught a lesson!
I-I think you should calm yourself... It's hot today, and you risk a heatstroke if your anger overboils.
Milord! A large group of villagers have gathered on the road ahead of us!
They knew of Milord's coming and are offering alcohol and rations to thank Milord's army!
So the commoners embrace the tides of change. Milord, shall we halt and savor a moment's respite?
I support this idea. It's sweltering, and the villagers are extending their goodwill. Let us stop and rest.
As for where... Yes, I think the flat plain by the side of the mountain shall do. It's not the most spacious, but it's adequate to set up camp.
Hmm...
The army set up camp by the mountain, gorged themselves on the offerings of the villagers, and enjoyed their break...
Can we really stop and nonchalantly put down camp by the roadside? Aren't we marching for war?
(The location is suspect. It's a long way away from our other units, and the enemy may ambush us from over the mountain...)
The army set up camp by the mountain, gorged themselves on the offerings of the villagers, and enjoyed their break...
What? I thought I as the general would decide!
(I suppose not... Something tells me I don't get a say in this story.)
Moments later, the scene changes to a massive encampment.
A feast of delectable dishes is lined up before me. I look around me and see swords, books, treasures... and even exotic animals around the camp.
The flyer wasn't lying about taking you from one magic place to the next.
Why would a marching army be hauling these things around, though?
Oh, my General, why are you all alone in here? Everyone outside is enjoying their drinks~
Perhaps it's because... you really wanted to see us? Heehee♪
There's no one else here but you, me, and her... You can do aaanything you want with us♥
Good point! The only question is – WHAT would you do, hmm? Heehee♥
...Excuse me, why won't you look at me?! My script says I'm the attractive dancer!
Come on, say it~ Aren't I attractive?
Um... Yeah.
The lovely mood was suddenly disrupted by the rumble of lightning...
In mere moments, a rainstorm had swept over the camp...
That sure came out of nowhere.

options.content: Umbrella! I need to find an umbrella!

General Commander.say: I feel like I've forgotten something really important...
...Well, I do, but more importantly – where even am I?
We are in Okehazama, Milord!
It's shocking how quickly rain came upon us, when the skies were clear just moments ago... An unfortunate change of weather.
I see. So we're in Okehazama...
It's been a really hot day, rain and thunder came suddenly...
And I'm playing a general in the Warring States period... Oh no!
We must prepare for battle, posthaste!
Meanwhile, under the cover of the thunderstorm, a cavalry unit had gathered in an attacking position atop the mountain...
We are in position. Awaiting orders to commence the attack.
Heehee. Imagine a sudden rainstorm whipping up to our benefit. The heavens are on our side.
Indeed. Milord's unyielding determination to attack has resulted in the perfect opportunity for us.
Heehee~ Keep the praise coming~♪
D-do we really need to fight?
Yes. There is no room for personal feelings on the battlefield.
Milord, give us the order, and the cavalry will charge. We shall return to you victorious.
I am on the brink of keeling over from boredom. Let's begin, shall we?

options.content: Cavalry? But some aren't even riding horses!
Really? They all count as cavalry?

General Commander.say: Hmm...
Apologies, but we lacked the resources for a complete cavalry unit...
Some say that a soldier atop any vehicle of war may be considered cavalry...
Ahem. Unfortunately, we did not have sufficient time to provide uniform equipment for the cavalry unit...
Regardless, they all exhibit a burning fighting spirit under their lord's leadership...
My Owner's waiting for us down there~♪
Troops, hear me! Go get 'em!
Your target is my Owner, and my Owner alone!
My troops camped nearby won't be able to make it here in time due to the rainstorm...
This is bad. Very bad. My camp is isolated and exposed...
I can already hear rallying cries calling out from outside my tent.
Then, the opposing lord lifts the flap and comes running into my tent!
So this is the end...
Owneeeeer! There's no escaping your fate!
Come heeeere!
She lunges at me like a cat, arms outstretched... without a weapon!
The battle was over, and peace was restored to the lands...
And so, the curtains fall on this act...
Owneeer! *squeeze* *cuddle* *sniff*
It's over now. You can stop hugging the Commander to death...
I'm not letting go of my Owner even if it's over! ...Hey, when did you get here, Memphis?
I've been here this whole time!
Well, I suppose that's the end...

Results of the Investigation.say: Several days have passed since the incident, and the onsen resort is back in holiday mode.
Plays are held daily at night, and they've become a hugely popular attraction with the guests.
I'm still on vacation now, and this morning, I received a report on the so-called "Spirited-Away Incident" slid in under my door.
"The Onsen Resort Spiriting-Away Incident - By investigator Bristol."
"...We live on an isolated island, completely unaware that the Great One is already in our midst."
"...I saw that in the shadow of that violent storm, the white snow ceased to be snow."
"...I saw that in the grimy ocean water, an indescribable beast was madly devouring its own twisted kind."
"...I saw that when the rain gave way, the sky bared a foreboding smile. The dark shadows twisted and danced madly, blotting out the light of the lone flame."
"...Human logic, human laws, they are meaningless here."
"...I should not have dove deeper. I should have turned back. Yet, I keep moving deeper and deeper even now, searching for more..."
"...For the forbidden miracles that are a mixture of unfathomable beings and mystery."

options.content: Feels like I lost some sanity just from reading this...

Results of the Investigation.say: "By the way, we've also attached copies of the other investigation team members' reports. Signed, Kirov and Saratoga."
Hehehe... The onsen resort, the Youkai Troupe, even the spiriting away... they earned me a pretty penny, nya♪

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Before the Play

Before the Play.say: This is a small story from before the Youkai Troupe performed their play...
Great. I knew you'd be willing to talk it out.
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: *yawn*... So, our troupe has been entertaining the resort for a looong time, and we've never hurt a soul...
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: So, be nice and pretend you didn't see us, alright?
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: This one has a question, as a fellow member of the Napping Club...
Is this play of yours merely a contrivance to frighten my compatriots?
The sleepy Shinano questioned the also sleepy Dream-Eater Baku with a sharp tone she seldom ever employs.
This shook the Dream-Eater Baku in a way that made it impossible to nap, even though she wanted to.
We're not gonna scare them. It's just an attraction – a part of the onsen resort, you see?
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: But if you really don't want us pulling pranks on people, I'll be sure to tell them not to do that.
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: No, what I really meant was... why do you wear those outfits?
Hmm? Because the youkai asked us to.
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: The onsen resort gets a looot of customers, but nobody plays with them. So the play and the outfits are like a way to draw them closer.
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: What are you implying...? That a real Youkai Troupe exists beyond the boundary of the torii gate...?
Pretty much. The barrier's entrance is starting to crumble, and it needs people to maintain it, so...
Before the Play.factiontag: Wants to Turn Into a Statue

Before the Play.say: So what seemed like an act of greed on Akashi's part was actually for the greater good... I am sure the guests will adore the youkai...
"Chief"... I have an idea that may benefit everyone...

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Youkai, Spirits, and...

Youkai, Spirits, and....say: This is a small story from before the Youkai Troupe performed their play...
The Sakuran girls had finished tidying up and returned to their rooms to rest for a while.
Little did they know that something strange was already in motion.
Onsen Resort - Inn Main Building
Is it just me, or does the resort look... wrong all of a sudden?
Yeah... It's almost like it was sent into a bizarro dimension...
It may have something to do with that rumble a moment ago... I'll go see Shinano.
Wait, Noshiro. It's a bad idea to split up. We should all stick together.
Hey, Yura... Am I seein' things, or is that cup some new hi-tech thing I haven't heard about?
Youkai, Spirits, and....factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Youkai, Spirits, and....say: It's kinda... moving on its own.
Youkai, Spirits, and....factiontag: Nice and Simple Kind of Gal

Youkai, Spirits, and....say: You're right! It's moving! Oh god, it's FLOATING!
What's going on?! Is there a ghost here?!
Leeeave... Leeeave this place...
You are not welcome heeere...
Eek! The rumors about youkai are true! They do exist!
Leeeave! Turn back and leeeeave! Go awaaaay!
The voice is getting louder!
...I know where it's coming from.
"Silence."
Yura's other Self reached out and grasped something. Somehow, that made the ominous voice disappear.
...A will-o'-the-wisp, hmm?
What? Where? Did you catch something? I don't see anything!
It's too weak to assume physical form, so it's no wonder you can't see it.
Now, what shall we do with you, little one? Something tells me you'll stir up trouble if I let you be...
BEEP BEEP!
Hm? A call from Shinano?

sequence: The Spiriting-Away Incident?  Run Like a Rabbit

Run Like a Rabbit.say: This is a small story from before the Youkai Troupe performed their play...
Onsen Resort - ???
Aha! I knew I wasn't imagining what I saw!
Suruga! Look! Right there!
...Suruga? Where did you go? Surugaaa!
Shimakaze looked all around, but Suruga was nowhere to be found.
Oh no! I must've became so engrossed in chasing that thing that I left Suruga behind!
So busy, so busy... Oh! Miss Rabbit!
Whatcha doing here? The show's about to begin.
Hm? Are you talking to me?
No, I meant the other rabbit beside you. Yes, I'm talking to you!
C'mon, hurry off and let Kappa know the play is starting!
Now, excuse me, there's a ton of other people I've gotta notify!
Whoa! How is it so fast?!
Hmm... You may be fast, but nobody is faster than me!
Full steam ahead!
O-okay... I'll be on my way...
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: Wants to Cure Her Social Anxiety

Run Like a Rabbit.say: If you could... tell Yuki-Onna as well, that would be great...
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: Wants to Cure Her Social Anxiety

Run Like a Rabbit.say: Yuki-Onna, you say? Got it! I'll find them in a jiffy!
Full steam ahead once again!
Why, thank you for letting me know, little bunbun.
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Run Like a Rabbit.say: I hate to ask, but could you go and tell Tengu as well?
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: This is Her Acting Master Plan

Run Like a Rabbit.say: Full steam ahead once again!
Who do you take me for? A granny? Hmph. Go and tell–
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Run Like a Rabbit.say: Roger! Full steam ahead, no breaks!
Wait! I haven't even told you her name yet! Come back here!
Run Like a Rabbit.factiontag: Wants You to Respect Your Elders

Run Like a Rabbit.say: *pant*... *pant*... That was the last one.
Interesting how the youkai are organizing a play... I can hardly sit still just thinking about it!
Come to think of it, I feel like I've forgotten something... What was I doing again?
Oh, right! I was supposed to look for Suruga and I completely forgot!
BEEP BEEP!
Hey, Shimakaze, do you hear me?
Whoa! Speak of the devil! I'm so glad to hear you're okay!
...Okay?
I'm gonna assume something happened while I was gone. What was it?
Nothing! Nothing happened whatsoever!
Oookay then. If you say so.
Anyway, I'm in the theater's reception room with Shinano and the Youkai Troupe. They're in the middle of a meeting.
Think you can make it here?
Oh, has she already gained control over the Youkai Troupe? That's amazing!
Uh... No. They're workshopping a surprise for the Commander's group when they arrive.
Just come here and we'll tell you the rest.
Working together with youkai to create a fantastic surprise... That sounds so much fun!
I just know the guests are going to love whatever they come up with!
I'll be there in a second!
The girls at the time had no idea what their plan would turn into.
Because what began as an innocent surprise would go on to become a major incident...

sequence: 温泉街神隠し事件  夏と温泉と怪談と

夏と温泉と怪談と.say: 今度のバカンスの旅先がここまで決まらないとは思わなかったわ……
はいはい！じゃあやっぱり深海はどう？
海の怪物、そして失われた遺跡を探しに行こう！
潜航艦じゃ体がろくに動かないもん…やっぱり幽霊船を追いに行こうよ！
撫順殿、ブリストル殿、何を言っているんですか！
夏といえばズバリ、海辺に水着に日光浴じゃないでしょうか！
それは母港でできるよー。せっかくのバカンスだしいつもと違うことをやりたくない？
海上の騎士、正義のヴィジランテパトロールでもどうかな？
あのさ…バカンス要素は？
ワーケーション？
はい！クリーブランドの提案はNGね！
意見がなかなかまとまらず、議論が続いていく――
なんかパッとこれってなるようなアイデアが出ないね…あ！指揮官、これは？

options.content: シュレッダーにどうぞ！

夏と温泉と怪談と.say: それは書類の中に紛れ込んでいたとあるチラシだった。
分かったわ！でも何が書いてあるかちょっと確認させて…
どれどれ…「日常の煩雑や喧騒から離れ」…「源泉かけ流しの温泉リゾートで、風雅なひと時をあなたにお届け」…
…「豊かな自然、上質な体験…さらにこの地にまつわる怪談も」…
…「神出鬼没な『妖怪一座』、その正体は一体…」…
「妖怪一座」ね…いかにもって感じで書いてあるけど、どうせただの客引き文句でしょ？
気づくと執務室はシーンと静まり返り、初月のチラシに視線がぐっと集まったようだ。
じゃあ指揮官、このチラシは捨て……
な、なんでみんなしてこっち見てるの？
それだーー！
はい？
やっぱ夏といえば肝試し、つまり怪談調査だよね！
妖怪が見れる…はいはいはい温泉街に一票！
重桜の妖怪伝説か…面白そう！
かかか怪談とか、そんなの嘘に決まっているわよ！
やっぱり別の行き先に――
信濃さんはどう思いますか？
温泉ならば…溜まった疲れを洗い流せる、良き提案と申す…
夏と温泉と怪談と.factiontag: 夢歩くドリームウォーカー

夏と温泉と怪談と.say: 重桜の離島であれば、他陣営の汝たちへのおもてなしもできよう…よきかな…
夏と温泉と怪談と.factiontag: 夢歩くドリームウォーカー

夏と温泉と怪談と.say: 初月の異議も虚しく、話はあっという間にどんどん進んでいく。
そうしてバカンスの行先は温泉街が抜きん出た票数で決まったのであった――

布団…全部干し終わった…うん、ふかふか…
平和な温泉街.actorName: 深雪 [ショッピング・ランデブー]

ぐぬぬ…怪しい

平和な温泉街.say: でも灯りをつけた人は一人も見当たらないんですが！

平和な温泉街.say: ここの施設はほぼ無人で動いているから、時間になったら自動でつくって能代から聞いたわ

平和な温泉街.say: な、なるほど……！
平和な温泉街.factiontag: うっさー！

平和な温泉街.say: じゃあそこは！？駿河殿、あの鳥居、なんとなく怪しく感じませんか？
平和な温泉街.factiontag: うっさー！

平和な温泉街.say: なんとなくって何よ！もう怪しいったら怪しいでいいでしょ？
平和な温泉街.factiontag: 目立ちたくない秀才

平和な温泉街.say: もうすぐ夜ご飯の時間だから、そろそろ戻らないと間に合わなくなるわよ
平和な温泉街.factiontag: 目立ちたくない秀才

平和な温泉街.say: ！！！駿河殿、見ました？！
平和な温泉街.factiontag: うっさー！

平和な温泉街.say: …今度は何？
平和な温泉街.factiontag: 目立ちたくない秀才

平和な温泉街.say: さっき何かが鳥居の後ろを飛んでいきました！
平和な温泉街.factiontag: うっさー！

平和な温泉街.say: 駿河殿ここで待っててください！島風、ちょっと調べて来ます！
平和な温泉街.factiontag: うっさー！

平和な温泉街.say: じゃあ夕ご飯はめしぬ……って島風！？待って！
平和な温泉街.factiontag: 目立ちたくない秀才

平和な温泉街.say: 一方、旅館の本館にて――
はいはい早く動いた動いた。観客を待たせる気なのかね？
平和な温泉街.factiontag: お年寄りを敬ってほしい

平和な温泉街.say: か、カッパは……みんなの驚く姿…楽しみ…っ///
平和な温泉街.factiontag: 人見知りを直すためと思えば

sequence: 温泉街神隠し事件  神隠し事件だ！

神隠し事件だ！.say: 2日後・饅頭温泉街
指揮官、もうすぐ着くよ！
指揮官、もうすぐ着くよ！
なんでサラトガちゃんのマネをするの…？
いやあ、だって楽しすぎて言葉が思いつかないもん！
…それにしても旅館のロビーまで来たのに、なんで誰もいないの？
てっきり先遣隊のみんなが出迎えてくれると思ったのに……
…確かにおかしい。同志指揮官、上陸してから信濃から何の連絡も来ていない
常識的に考えればあり得ない状況ね
もしかして…
ふっふっふー…謎の雰囲気がプンプンするぜー！
（…嫌な予感がする。とりあえず旅館本館に入って調べてみよう）
饅頭温泉街・旅館本館
信濃さん、片付けてくれた…すぐにでも泊まれそう
台所にも、食材がいっぱい…新鮮で、美味しそう
ウェルカムドリンクはお茶かな…あ、ケトルの中身もまだ温かいよ
でもみんなどこに行ったんだろう？ここにいるはずなのに
ま…まさかこれが重桜に伝わる「神隠し」！？
指揮官！！これ見て！！
撫順が指差した食卓の上には、異様な存在感を放つ一枚のカードが置かれている。
赤黒二色のカードの上に、雑誌などから切り抜いた文字がツギハギで作られた文章が載っていて、かなり不気味だ。
はいはい！読み上げるね
「英明勇武なる指揮官様へ」
「貴殿ら一行をもてなそうと、我々はこの世で一番素晴らしい演目を用意した」
「汝の仲間はすでに準備ができており…どうぞ円形劇場の入口よりお越しください」
「心より歓迎の意を込めて」
「――妖怪一座より」
「妖怪一座」って書いてあるよね！ね！
まさかチラシに載ってた「妖怪一座」が実在するなんて！
存在しなかったら詐欺よ！でも本当に妖怪なのかな……
この内容だと、「妖怪一座」を名乗る連中が先遣隊の仲間たちをさらったことになるな
これは由々しき事態だ。同志指揮官
――確かにみんないなくなったが、さすがにさらわれたと決めつけるのは早すぎないか……？
じゃあ指揮官、まずはブリストルたちがこの事件をかるーく調査してあげよう！
そう！撫順、霞、初月、ブリストルの四人で、ちょうどパーティーが組めるよ！
だから、今回の件をブリストルたちに任せて欲しい！
ちょっと！…どうしてしれっと初月も入っているの！？
だってこういうパーティーは4人ってのが相場じゃん！
なるほど……はあ？
このままじゃ心もとないな。同志指揮官、念のため母港に支援要請を打電しても？
――元々仕事が終わった仲間たちを順次ここで合流させる予定になっている
――後から来る仲間たちに「妖怪一座」の件を知らせて、準備させたほうがいいかもしれない
――よし。戦力が揃うまではブリストルたち調査チームに一任しよう
やったぁ！絶対に事件を解決してみせるよー！

sequence: 温泉街神隠し事件  裏世界の入り口

裏世界の入り口.say: 饅頭温泉街・謎の鳥居近く
ふわりん、ここが怪しいって……
霞、ふわりんってそもそも……ま、待って！怪しいのはどこぉ？
？ふわりんはふわりんだよ……？
探索者のランプもだんだん明るくなってきた！この鳥居の向こうには新しい調査スポットが隠されているのか？
むむ、予告状で言ってた……円型劇場の入り口はここみたいだね
はわわわわどいてどいてーーー！
ズドン、と何かが木の上から叫び声と共に落ちてきた。
あいたたたた……
撫順？急に消えたと思ったら…
なんで木から落ちたの？
いたた…空から島全体を見下ろして犯人と先遣隊のみんなを探そうと思ったけど、新しく作ったロケットが失敗しちゃって…
サラトガちゃんに偵察機を飛ばしてもらうよう頼めばよかったじゃない？
それじゃあ自分で調査する感じにならないよ！あいたた…
とにかく、探索者パーティーが揃ったね。すべての手がかりは鳥居の向こうを指していて、もしかしたらあそこが例の「妖怪一座」の本拠地かもよ！
というわけで、さっそく中に入って調査だー！
このまま入るの！？
ふわりん、行こ？
せ、せめて指揮官に連絡してから――
初月ぃー、早くしないと置いて行っちゃうよー
……ちょ、ちょっと待ってってばー！
饅頭温泉街・？？？
あ、予め言っとくけど、別におばけとか妖怪とか怖くないからねっ！
みんなが危険な目に遭わないか心配でついて行ってるのっ！
はいはい、そういうことにしとくよ～
そ、それより鳥居に入ってからもうだいぶ歩いたよね…？
霧からまだ抜け出せていないし…鳥居の向こうって普通こんなに広いの？
ううん。霞たち、もう温泉街の外
ええ！？
そろそろ霧を出られるよって、ふわりんが言ってた。うん、お友達が待ってる
お友達？噂の「妖怪一座」がついに登場ってこと？！
と、友達って言われてもあまり会いたくないわ……
やっぱり戻って指揮官に報告しようよ！
ここまで来たらもう戻れないわ――
パァン――！！
クラッカーの音とともにカラフルなリボンが天井から舞い降りてきた。
円型劇場へウェルカムっす！！
裏世界の入り口.factiontag: 温泉でパーティーっす！

裏世界の入り口.say: よ、ようこそ……
裏世界の入り口.factiontag: 人見知りを直すためと思えば

裏世界の入り口.say: きゃああああああ――
慌てなさんな～。わっちらに悪意はないぞ？
裏世界の入り口.factiontag: 年季の実力は強いじゃ

裏世界の入り口.say: わっちは「妖怪一座」の副団長ま…海坊主じゃ。ようこそ妖怪劇場へ
裏世界の入り口.factiontag: 年季の実力は強いじゃ

裏世界の入り口.say: 我は「妖怪一座」の座長のタヌキ…ニャ
わあ！やっぱり「妖怪一座」は本当にあったんだ！
ってことはみんな妖怪なの？わたしたちと全然見た目が違うし！
（超小声）おばけじゃなくて妖怪でよかった……
温泉旅館の予告状、みんなが置いた…？
……予告状？

裏世界の入り口.factiontag: お年寄りを敬ってほしい

裏世界の入り口.say: それと、人手不足だから、そちらの長も連れと一緒に準備に向かっているぞ？
裏世界の入り口.factiontag: お年寄りを敬ってほしい

裏世界の入り口.say: 長……信濃さん？
なるほど！これはきっと先遣隊のみんなからのサプライズだよ！
（超小声）ドッキリの間違いじゃなくて？
ではしばし待つニャ
素晴らしき演劇をお見せするニャ！
温泉街の目玉、「妖怪一座」の演劇！楽しみ！
霞もふわりんも、わくわく
は、はい？もう始まっちゃうの？初月たち……
まだ指揮官に連絡していないんだけどーー！？

雪女は誰？.say: 「白い霧が晴れると、旅人は自分たちがマジヤバな雪山の中にいることに気づいた！」
………い、いきなり雪山の中になった！
はくちゅん！臨場感強すぎるよー！
さささ寒いよ！温度はともかく……この雪って本物ー！？
「ガチ風と雪がビュービューと吹いて、旅人は体力がゴッソリ奪われた」
「いやあ、この時期に急に雪山に行くなんていくらなんでもそれはないんじゃね？」
別に来たくて来たわけじゃないわよ！勝手に設定追加しないで！
それより今の尾張の声でしょ？一体どういうこと？
「尾張じゃなくてナレーションだって！」
「それと初づ…あなたたちはもう演劇の中の旅人よ！」
なるほど！これが妖怪一座が言ってた興行か！
舞台での演劇だと思ったけど、まさか自分で参加するやつだなんて！
参加型？……楽しそう！
「じゃあ続けるよ？」
「えー旅人はえぐい雪嵐の中で必至に歩き続けた。つらたん」
「んで、体力がもう、どえらいことになって意識も飛んじゃいそう！」
「その時！眼の前に山小屋が見えた！」
やったぁ！山小屋があれば雪の中でガクガクしなくて済むよ！
そうね。寒いんだから早く小屋に入ろ？
「こうして旅人たちは震える手で扉を開けて、山小屋に入ったがー」
「マジで可哀想な状況だったためか、小屋の中は神的に最高だった。小屋の壁は厚くて頑丈だし、食べ物も薪もたくさん！」
よかったあ…薪があれば火を起こせて暖が取れるよね！
食べ物もあるから、お腹ペコペコにならない
でも霞たち、部屋に勝手に入って、食べ物をもらって、もしかして…悪い子？
大丈夫だよ霞！山小屋ってそういう風に利用できるから！
えへへ、さっそく肉をしっかり焼いて……いい焼き加減！
もうお腹減ってるから先に！いただきまぁす！
「幸運にも雪から避難した旅人は、焚き火を囲んでうまい物を食べながらおしゃべりをした」
「その時！ドン！と扉が大きく開かれ、雪混じりの風が山小屋に吹き込んできた！」
あわわわ！早く扉を閉めて閉めて！
火が消えちゃったら大変なことになっちゃうよー！
「なんとか扉を閉めた旅人たち。山小屋に平和が戻った」
「と思いきや、いつの間にか一人増えていた！」
出て行って
？ブリストル、今「出て行って」って…
ん？言ってないよ？
ここから出て行って…！
愚かな人間め、誰がこの山小屋に入っていいと言った？罰として凍らせてやるわ！
ひゃぅ！よ、妖怪が現れた！？
初月落ち着いて！ここがあなたのうちだって言うなら、証拠はあるよね？
私は雪女、この雪山をずっとずっとさまよい続けてきたわ。だからこの雪山のすべては私のものよ！
すべて！？じゃあ土地の権利書は？この山小屋の建設許可は？それがないのに、なんであなたのものだって言えるの？
け、権利書？そんなの……
「その時！ドン！と扉が大きく開かれ、雪混じりの風がまた山小屋に吹き込んできた！」
わああああ！扉を閉めてーー！
バカな人間！誰が山小屋に入っていいと言ったの？罰として氷漬けにしてあげるんだから♪
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: 酒匂？
もうかわいいおバカさん！私は雪女、酒匂じゃないです！
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: どう見ても酒匂でしょ！？
私は雪女、この雪山をずっとずっとさまよい続けてきたわ。だからこの雪山のすべては私のものよ！
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: はあ…雪女がもう一人いた。ってことで合ってるよね…？
私が唯一の雪女よ！さあ、怯えろ！艦船の性能を活かせないまま――
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: はいストップ！結局どっちが本物の雪女なの？
こいつがニセモノで私が本物！
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: （小声）って、脚本の中に書いてるわよ！
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: ？？それは初耳ね。こっちとしてはあなたがニセモノで、私が本物なんだけど
「えー。どういうわけか雪女が二人現れたけどぉ……」
「その時！ドン！とまたも扉が大きく開かれた音がした！」
もう三回目だよ！今度はブリストルがしっかり閉めるからね！
に、人間さん、だれが深…雪の山小屋に入っていいと言ったの？ええと、こ、凍らせて…
……凍らせてやる？
う、うん…凍らせてやるんだから…
深雪、何やってるの……
み、深雪じゃなくて、雪女だよ……？
んー凍らせたいのは分かったから、まずはルールを守って列に並んでねー
ほら、もう先に二人もいるんだから
そ、そうなの…？でも私が本物の雪女なのに……？
そっちこそニセモノじゃなくて？
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: 違うわね。私が本物の雪女よ
本物はーーわ・た・し・な・の！
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: （なんなのこの茶番…いつになったら終わるの……）

そこの「我慢できなかった雪女」が本物よ
どういうこと？私が本物なのではなくて？
雪女は誰？.actorName: 真面目で強がりな雪女

雪女は誰？.say: ……ど、どうして分かったの……？
そんなのすぐ分かるじゃない…
